spec_match.rationale: Excellent helper utility mapping exact spec parameters: scope_extensions, related_applications, and /.well-known/web-app-origin-association formats.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive: updates multiple JSON outputs live as the user types, features input validation alerts, and clipboard copying triggers.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Corresponds fully to the parent index card description.

edge_cases.rationale: Performs robust validations (e.g., checking HTTPS protocols, non-equal origins, and required fields) on inputs.

references.rationale: Missing the mandatory chromestatus.com reference link on this concept page, in direct violation of the project's AGENTS.md rule.

design_system.rationale: Uses sleek forms, a tab switcher, clean code highlights, and visual success/error validation badges.

openQuestions.title: Missing ChromeStatus Link
openQuestions.detail: Add a canonical ChromeStatus link (https://chromestatus.com/feature/5123349239955456) to complies with AGENTS.md guidelines.
